title: Alex Chen Developer Terminal Portfolio
seoTitle: Alex Chen Developer Terminal Portfolio - Downloadable Premium Portfolio Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: A terminal-inspired developer portfolio with code aesthetics, animated surfaces, and a sharp technical personality.
summary: A terminal-inspired developer portfolio with code aesthetics, animated surfaces, and a sharp technical personality.
description: Built for engineers and technical creators, this portfolio template combines developer tooling references, terminal visuals, and interactive sections in a highly recognizable personal brand format.
audience: developers, engineers, and technical personal brands
prompt: Design a premium terminal-style developer portfolio with code-inspired typography, matrix details, sharp technical branding, and strong readability.
layoutNotes: The theme is technical and immersive, but the content still needs to scan quickly.
This template suits engineers who want a memorable code-centric personal site.
responsiveNotes: The terminal-like layout collapses into simpler sections on mobile screens.
Decorative effects remain secondary so the site still feels usable on touch devices.

files.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>dev.portfolio — Alex Chen</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* ── CSS Custom Properties ────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --bg-primary: #0a0e14;
      --bg-secondary: #0d1117;
      --bg-tertiary: #161b22;
      --bg-card: #0d1117;
      --border: #1e2d3d;
      --border-bright: #2a3f55;
      --green: #00ff9c;
      --green-dim: #00cc7d;
      --green-dark: #003d22;
      --cyan: #00d4ff;
      --cyan-dim: #00a8cc;
      --magenta: #ff79c6;
      --yellow: #f1fa8c;
      --orange: #ffb86c;
      --red: #ff5555;
      --white: #e6edf3;
      --gray: #7d8590;
      --gray-dim: #484f58;
      --font-primary: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
      --font-code: 'Fira Code', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      --radius: 6px;
      --transition: 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
      --glow-green: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.15);
      --glow-cyan: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.15);
    }

    /* ── Reset & Base ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }
    body {
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      color: var(--white);
      line-height: 1.7;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }
    ::selection { background: var(--green); color: var(--bg-primary); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg-secondary); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border-bright); border-radius: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--green-dim); }

    a { color: var(--cyan); text-decoration: none; transition: color var(--transition); }
    a:hover { color: var(--green); }

    /* ── Matrix Rain Canvas ──────────────────────────────── */
    #matrix-canvas {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0.07;
    }

    /* ── Scan Line Overlay ────────────────────────────────── */
    body::after {
      content: '';
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      background: repeating-linear-gradient(
        0deg,
        transparent,
        transparent 2px,
        rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.015) 2px,
        rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.015) 4px
      );
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 9999;
    }

    /* ── Navigation ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .nav-terminal {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 1000;
      background: rgba(10, 14, 20, 0.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0 2rem;
      height: 48px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
    }
    .nav-terminal::before {
      content: '>';
      color: var(--green);
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-right: 0.5rem;
      font-size: 1.1rem;
    }
    .nav-prompt { color: var(--green); margin-right: 0.25rem; font-weight: 500; }
    .nav-cmd {
      color: var(--cyan);
      cursor: pointer;
      padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      transition: all var(--transition);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      position: relative;
    }
    .nav-cmd:hover, .nav-cmd.active {
      background: var(--green-dark);
      color: var(--green);
    }
    .nav-cmd::before { content: './'; opacity: 0.5; }
    .nav-cursor {
      display: inline-block;
      width: 8px; height: 18px;
      background: var(--green);
      margin-left: 0.5rem;
      animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
      vertical-align: middle;
    }
    @keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }

    /* ── Main Content Wrapper ─────────────────────────────── */
    .main-wrap {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      max-width: 1100px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 1.5rem;
    }

    /* ── Section Base ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    section {
      padding: 5rem 0;
      position: relative;
    }
    .section-header {
      margin-bottom: 3rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 1rem;
    }
    .section-header .line-num {
      color: var(--gray-dim);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      min-width: 2ch;
      text-align: right;
      user-select: none;
    }
    .section-header .comment {
      color: var(--gray);
      font-style: italic;
    }
    .section-header .keyword {
      color: var(--magenta);
    }
    .section-header .fn-name {
      color: var(--cyan);
    }
    .section-divider {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px dashed var(--border);
      margin: 0;
    }

    /* ── Hero Section ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding-top: 48px;
    }
    .hero-terminal {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 25px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), var(--glow-green);
    }
    .terminal-titlebar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .terminal-dot {
      width: 12px; height: 12px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .terminal-dot.red { background: #ff5f57; }
    .terminal-dot.yellow { background: #febc2e; }
    .terminal-dot.green { background: #28c840; }
    .terminal-title {
      flex: 1;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--gray);
    }
    .terminal-body {
      padding: 2rem;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
    }
    .terminal-line { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
    .terminal-line .prompt { color: var(--green); font-weight: 600; }
    .terminal-line .path { color: var(--cyan); }
    .terminal-line .cmd { color: var(--white); }
    .terminal-line .flag { color: var(--yellow); }
    .terminal-line .string { color: var(--orange); }
    .hero-name {
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--green);
      text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.3);
      margin: 1rem 0 0.5rem;
    }
    .hero-title {
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.4rem);
      color: var(--cyan);
      font-weight: 400;
    }
    .typewriter-container {
      display: inline;
    }
    .typewriter-text {
      border-right: 2px solid var(--green);
      animation: blink-caret 0.8s step-end infinite;
    }
    @keyframes blink-caret { 50% { border-color: transparent; } }
    .hero-ascii {
      color: var(--green-dim);
      font-size: 0.55rem;
      line-height: 1.2;
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      opacity: 0.6;
      white-space: pre;
    }
    .hero-cta {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
      border: 1px solid var(--green);
      color: var(--green);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: transparent;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .hero-cta:hover {
      background: var(--green);
      color: var(--bg-primary);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
    }

    /* ── Skills / Orbit Section ───────────────────────────── */
    .orbit-container {
      position: relative;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 500px;
      height: 500px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .orbit-center {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%; left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 100px; height: 100px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border: 2px solid var(--green);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--green);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      z-index: 5;
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.2;
    }
    .orbit-ring {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%; left: 50%;
      border: 1px dashed var(--border-bright);
      border-radius: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    }
    .orbit-ring-1 { width: 240px; height: 240px; }
    .orbit-ring-2 { width: 370px; height: 370px; }
    .orbit-ring-3 { width: 490px; height: 490px; }
    .orbit-item {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%; left: 50%;
      width: 50px; height: 50px;
      margin: -25px 0 0 -25px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-bright);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--white);
      font-weight: 600;
      z-index: 10;
      transition: all 0.5s ease;
      cursor: default;
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.1;
      padding: 4px;
    }
    .orbit-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--green);
      color: var(--green);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      transform: scale(1.2);
      z-index: 20;
    }
    .orbit-item.ring-1 { animation: orbit1 12s linear infinite; }
    .orbit-item.ring-2 { animation: orbit2 20s linear infinite; }
    .orbit-item.ring-3 { animation: orbit3 30s linear infinite; }
    @keyframes orbit1 {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(120px) rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(120px) rotate(-360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes orbit2 {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(185px) rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(185px) rotate(-360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes orbit3 {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(245px) rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(245px) rotate(-360deg); }
    }
    .skills-list {
      margin-top: 2rem;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
      gap: 0.75rem;
    }
    .skill-bar-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.75rem;
      padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .skill-bar-label { color: var(--cyan); min-width: 80px; }
    .skill-bar-track {
      flex: 1;
      height: 4px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border-radius: 2px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .skill-bar-fill {
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), var(--cyan));
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: width 1.5s ease;
    }
    .skill-bar-pct { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.7rem; min-width: 30px; text-align: right; }

    /* ── Projects / Terminal Cards ────────────────────────── */
    .projects-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr));
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }
    .project-card {
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .project-card:hover {
      border-color: var(--green);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      transform: translateY(-4px);
    }
    .project-card-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .project-card-dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
    .project-card-dots span {
      width: 10px; height: 10px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .project-card-title {
      flex: 1;
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--gray);
    }
    .project-card-body { padding: 1.25rem; }
    .project-card-body .comment { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.8rem; }
    .project-card-body .code-block {
      margin: 0.75rem 0;
      padding: 1rem;
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
      overflow-x: auto;
    }
    .project-card-body .code-block .kw { color: var(--magenta); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .fn { color: var(--cyan); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .str { color: var(--orange); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .num { color: var(--yellow); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .cm { color: var(--gray-dim); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .op { color: var(--red); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .vr { color: var(--white); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .ty { color: var(--green); }
    .project-tags {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }
    .project-tag {
      padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      border-radius: 3px;
      border: 1px solid;
    }
    .project-tag.green { color: var(--green); border-color: var(--green-dark); }
    .project-tag.cyan { color: var(--cyan); border-color: rgba(0,212,255,0.2); }
    .project-tag.magenta { color: var(--magenta); border-color: rgba(255,121,198,0.2); }
    .project-tag.yellow { color: var(--yellow); border-color: rgba(241,250,140,0.2); }
    .project-links {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }

    /* ── Experience Timeline ──────────────────────────────── */
    .timeline {
      position: relative;
      padding-left: 2.5rem;
    }
    .timeline::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 10px;
      top: 0; bottom: 0;
      width: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--green), var(--cyan), var(--border));
    }
    .timeline-item {
      position: relative;
      margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
      padding: 1.5rem;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .timeline-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--cyan);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-cyan);
    }
    .timeline-item::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: -2.15rem;
      top: 1.75rem;
      width: 12px; height: 12px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green);
      border: 2px solid var(--bg-primary);
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,255,156,0.4);
    }
    .timeline-date {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--green);
      margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
    }
    .timeline-role {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--cyan);
    }
    .timeline-company {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    }
    .timeline-desc {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      line-height: 1.8;
    }
    .timeline-desc li {
      list-style: none;
      padding-left: 1.25rem;
      position: relative;
    }
    .timeline-desc li::before {
      content: '$';
      position: absolute;
      left: 0;
      color: var(--green);
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* ── GitHub Contribution Graph ─────────────────────────── */
    .contrib-graph {
      overflow-x: auto;
      padding: 1rem;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
    }
    .contrib-months {
      display: flex;
      gap: 0;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      padding-left: 36px;
    }
    .contrib-months span { min-width: 52px; }
    .contrib-grid {
      display: flex;
      gap: 3px;
    }
    .contrib-days-label {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 3px;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--gray-dim);
      margin-right: 6px;
      padding-top: 0;
    }
    .contrib-days-label span {
      height: 11px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .contrib-columns {
      display: flex;
      gap: 3px;
    }
    .contrib-col {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 3px;
    }
    .contrib-cell {
      width: 11px; height: 11px;
      border-radius: 2px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    }
    .contrib-cell.l1 { background: #0e4429; }
    .contrib-cell.l2 { background: #006d32; }
    .contrib-cell.l3 { background: #26a641; }
    .contrib-cell.l4 { background: #39d353; }
    .contrib-legend {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      margin-top: 0.75rem;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .contrib-legend .contrib-cell { width: 11px; height: 11px; }
    .contrib-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .contrib-stat-num { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .contrib-stat-label { color: var(--gray); }

    /* ── Blog / Code Snippets ──────────────────────────────── */
    .blog-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }
    .blog-card {
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .blog-card:hover {
      border-color: var(--cyan);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-cyan);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }
    .blog-card-header {
      padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .blog-card-file {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--cyan);
    }
    .blog-card-lang {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
      border-radius: 3px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--gray);
    }
    .blog-card-body {
      padding: 1.25rem;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }
    .blog-card-body .snippet {
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      padding: 1rem;
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      overflow-x: auto;
      white-space: pre;
    }
    .blog-card-meta {
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--gray-dim);
    }

    /* ── Contact Terminal ──────────────────────────────────── */
    .contact-terminal {
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .contact-terminal .terminal-titlebar {
      border-radius: 0;
    }
    .contact-body { padding: 2rem; }
    .contact-line {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .contact-prompt {
      color: var(--green);
      font-weight: 600;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .contact-input {
      flex: 1;
      min-width: 200px;
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
      color: var(--white);
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      transition: border-color var(--transition);
      outline: none;
    }
    .contact-input:focus { border-color: var(--green); }
    .contact-input::placeholder { color: var(--gray-dim); }
    .contact-textarea {
      resize: vertical;
      min-height: 100px;
    }
    .contact-submit {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
      background: var(--green);
      color: var(--bg-primary);
      border: none;
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .contact-submit:hover {
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }

    /* ── Footer ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
      padding: 3rem 0 2rem;
      border-top: 1px dashed var(--border);
      text-align: center;
    }
    .footer-ascii {

    ║                                                       ║
    ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
      </pre>
      <div class="footer-links">
        <a href="#">github://alex-chen</a>
        <a href="#">linkedin://in/alexchen</a>
        <a href="#">twitter://@alexdevs</a>
        <a href="#">mailto://alex@dev.io</a>
      </div>
      <p class="footer-copy">
        © 2025 Alex Chen — crafted with <span class="heart"><3</span> and too much caffeine
      </p>
    </div>
  </footer>

  <!-- ═══ JavaScript ═══ -->
  <script>
    /* ── Matrix Rain ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initMatrixRain() {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('matrix-canvas');
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      let w, h, columns, drops;
      const chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}|;:,./<>?~`';
      const fontSize = 14;

      function resize() {
        w = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
        h = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
        columns = Math.floor(w / fontSize);
        drops = Array(columns).fill(1);
      }
      resize();
      window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

      function draw() {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 14, 20, 0.05)';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff9c';
        ctx.font = fontSize + 'px monospace';
        for (let i = 0; i < drops.length; i++) {
          const char = chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
          ctx.fillText(char, i * fontSize, drops[i] * fontSize);
          if (drops[i] * fontSize > h && Math.random() > 0.975) {
            drops[i] = 0;
          }
          drops[i]++;
        }
      }
      setInterval(draw, 50);
    })();

    /* ── Typewriter Effect ───────────────────────────────── */
    (function initTypewriter() {
      const el = document.getElementById('typewriter');
      const phrases = [
        'Full-Stack Developer',
        'Open Source Contributor',
        'Systems Architect',
        'DevOps Engineer',
        'Rust Enthusiast',
        'Coffee → Code Converter'
      ];
      let phraseIdx = 0, charIdx = 0, deleting = false, pause = 0;

      function type() {
        const current = phrases[phraseIdx];
        if (pause > 0) { pause--; requestAnimationFrame(type); return; }

        if (!deleting) {
          el.textContent = current.substring(0, charIdx + 1);
          charIdx++;
          if (charIdx === current.length) { deleting = true; pause = 60; }
        } else {
          el.textContent = current.substring(0, charIdx - 1);
          charIdx--;
          if (charIdx === 0) { deleting = false; phraseIdx = (phraseIdx + 1) % phrases.length; pause = 15; }
        }
        setTimeout(() => requestAnimationFrame(type), deleting ? 35 : 70);
      }
      type();
    })();

    /* ── GitHub Contribution Graph ────────────────────────── */
    (function initContribGraph() {
      const container = document.getElementById('contrib-graph');
      const months = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];
      const days = ['','Mon','','Wed','','Fri',''];
      const weeks = 52;
      const levels = ['','l1','l2','l3','l4'];

      // Month labels
      const monthsDiv = document.createElement('div');
      monthsDiv.className = 'contrib-months';
      for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
        const s = document.createElement('span');
        s.textContent = months[i];
        monthsDiv.appendChild(s);
      }
      container.appendChild(monthsDiv);

      const gridWrap = document.createElement('div');
      gridWrap.style.display = 'flex';

      // Day labels
      const daysDiv = document.createElement('div');
      daysDiv.className = 'contrib-days-label';
      days.forEach(d => {
        const s = document.createElement('span');
        s.textContent = d;
        daysDiv.appendChild(s);
      });
      gridWrap.appendChild(daysDiv);

      // Columns (weeks)
      const colsDiv = document.createElement('div');
      colsDiv.className = 'contrib-columns';
      let totalContribs = 0;
      for (let w = 0; w < weeks; w++) {
        const col = document.createElement('div');
        col.className = 'contrib-col';
        for (let d = 0; d < 7; d++) {
          const cell = document.createElement('div');
          cell.className = 'contrib-cell';
          const r = Math.random();
          if (r > 0.35) {
            let lvl;
            if (r > 0.92) lvl = 4;
            else if (r > 0.82) lvl = 3;
            else if (r > 0.6) lvl = 2;
            else lvl = 1;
            cell.classList.add(levels[lvl]);
            totalContribs += lvl;
          }
          col.appendChild(cell);
        }
        colsDiv.appendChild(col);
      }
      gridWrap.appendChild(colsDiv);
      container.appendChild(gridWrap);

      // Legend
      const legend = document.createElement('div');
      legend.className = 'contrib-legend';
      legend.innerHTML = 'Less ';
      levels.forEach(l => {
        const c = document.createElement('div');
        c.className = 'contrib-cell ' + l;
        legend.appendChild(c);
      });
      legend.innerHTML += ' More';
      container.appendChild(legend);

      // Stats
      const stats = document.createElement('div');
      stats.className = 'contrib-stats';
      stats.innerHTML = `
        <div><span class="contrib-stat-num">${totalContribs}</span> <span class="contrib-stat-label">contributions in the last year</span></div>
        <div><span class="contrib-stat-num">${Math.floor(totalContribs / 7)}</span> <span class="contrib-stat-label">avg per day</span></div>
        <div><span class="contrib-stat-num">${Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 15}</span> <span class="contrib-stat-label">day streak</span></div>
      `;
      container.appendChild(stats);
    })();

    /* ── Scroll Reveal ────────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initScrollReveal() {
      const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
      const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            entry.target.classList.add('visible');
          }
        });
      }, { threshold: 0.1 });
      reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
    })();

    /* ── Nav Active State ─────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initNavActive() {
      const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
      const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-cmd');
      const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            navLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
            const link = document.querySelector(`.nav-cmd[href="#${entry.target.id}"]`);
            if (link) link.classList.add('active');
          }
        });
      }, { threshold: 0.3 });
      sections.forEach(s => observer.observe(s));
    })();

    /* ── Contact Form ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initContact() {
      const btn = document.getElementById('contact-submit');
      const form = document.getElementById('contact-form');
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const name = document.getElementById('c-name').value.trim();
        const email = document.getElementById('c-email').value.trim();
        const msg = document.getElementById('c-msg').value.trim();
        if (!name || !email || !msg) {
          btn.textContent = '> error: fill all fields';
          btn.style.background = 'var(--red)';
          setTimeout(() => {
            btn.textContent = '> send_message';
            btn.style.background = '';
          }, 2000);
          return;
        }
        btn.textContent = '> sending...';
        btn.disabled = true;
        setTimeout(() => {
          btn.textContent = '> message_sent ✓';
          btn.style.background = 'var(--cyan)';
          setTimeout(() => {
            btn.textContent = '> send_message';
            btn.style.background = '';
            btn.disabled = false;
            form.reset();
          }, 2500);
        }, 1500);
      });
    })();

    /* ── Smooth scroll for nav ────────────────────────────── */
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-cmd').forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const target = document.querySelector(link.getAttribute('href'));
        if (target) {
          target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
        }
      });
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>dev.portfolio — Alex Chen</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* ── CSS Custom Properties ────────────────────────────── */
    :root {
      --bg-primary: #0a0e14;
      --bg-secondary: #0d1117;
      --bg-tertiary: #161b22;
      --bg-card: #0d1117;
      --border: #1e2d3d;
      --border-bright: #2a3f55;
      --green: #00ff9c;
      --green-dim: #00cc7d;
      --green-dark: #003d22;
      --cyan: #00d4ff;
      --cyan-dim: #00a8cc;
      --magenta: #ff79c6;
      --yellow: #f1fa8c;
      --orange: #ffb86c;
      --red: #ff5555;
      --white: #e6edf3;
      --gray: #7d8590;
      --gray-dim: #484f58;
      --font-primary: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
      --font-code: 'Fira Code', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      --radius: 6px;
      --transition: 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
      --glow-green: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.15);
      --glow-cyan: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.15);
    }

    /* ── Reset & Base ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }
    body {
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      color: var(--white);
      line-height: 1.7;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }
    ::selection { background: var(--green); color: var(--bg-primary); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg-secondary); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border-bright); border-radius: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--green-dim); }

    a { color: var(--cyan); text-decoration: none; transition: color var(--transition); }
    a:hover { color: var(--green); }

    /* ── Matrix Rain Canvas ──────────────────────────────── */
    #matrix-canvas {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0.07;
    }

    /* ── Scan Line Overlay ────────────────────────────────── */
    body::after {
      content: '';
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0;
      width: 100%; height: 100%;
      background: repeating-linear-gradient(
        0deg,
        transparent,
        transparent 2px,
        rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.015) 2px,
        rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.015) 4px
      );
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 9999;
    }

    /* ── Navigation ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .nav-terminal {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 1000;
      background: rgba(10, 14, 20, 0.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 0 2rem;
      height: 48px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
    }
    .nav-terminal::before {
      content: '>';
      color: var(--green);
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-right: 0.5rem;
      font-size: 1.1rem;
    }
    .nav-prompt { color: var(--green); margin-right: 0.25rem; font-weight: 500; }
    .nav-cmd {
      color: var(--cyan);
      cursor: pointer;
      padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      transition: all var(--transition);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      position: relative;
    }
    .nav-cmd:hover, .nav-cmd.active {
      background: var(--green-dark);
      color: var(--green);
    }
    .nav-cmd::before { content: './'; opacity: 0.5; }
    .nav-cursor {
      display: inline-block;
      width: 8px; height: 18px;
      background: var(--green);
      margin-left: 0.5rem;
      animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
      vertical-align: middle;
    }
    @keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }

    /* ── Main Content Wrapper ─────────────────────────────── */
    .main-wrap {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      max-width: 1100px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 1.5rem;
    }

    /* ── Section Base ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    section {
      padding: 5rem 0;
      position: relative;
    }
    .section-header {
      margin-bottom: 3rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 1rem;
    }
    .section-header .line-num {
      color: var(--gray-dim);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      min-width: 2ch;
      text-align: right;
      user-select: none;
    }
    .section-header .comment {
      color: var(--gray);
      font-style: italic;
    }
    .section-header .keyword {
      color: var(--magenta);
    }
    .section-header .fn-name {
      color: var(--cyan);
    }
    .section-divider {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px dashed var(--border);
      margin: 0;
    }

    /* ── Hero Section ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding-top: 48px;
    }
    .hero-terminal {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 25px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), var(--glow-green);
    }
    .terminal-titlebar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .terminal-dot {
      width: 12px; height: 12px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .terminal-dot.red { background: #ff5f57; }
    .terminal-dot.yellow { background: #febc2e; }
    .terminal-dot.green { background: #28c840; }
    .terminal-title {
      flex: 1;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--gray);
    }
    .terminal-body {
      padding: 2rem;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
    }
    .terminal-line { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
    .terminal-line .prompt { color: var(--green); font-weight: 600; }
    .terminal-line .path { color: var(--cyan); }
    .terminal-line .cmd { color: var(--white); }
    .terminal-line .flag { color: var(--yellow); }
    .terminal-line .string { color: var(--orange); }
    .hero-name {
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--green);
      text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 255, 156, 0.3);
      margin: 1rem 0 0.5rem;
    }
    .hero-title {
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.4rem);
      color: var(--cyan);
      font-weight: 400;
    }
    .typewriter-container {
      display: inline;
    }
    .typewriter-text {
      border-right: 2px solid var(--green);
      animation: blink-caret 0.8s step-end infinite;
    }
    @keyframes blink-caret { 50% { border-color: transparent; } }
    .hero-ascii {
      color: var(--green-dim);
      font-size: 0.55rem;
      line-height: 1.2;
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      opacity: 0.6;
      white-space: pre;
    }
    .hero-cta {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
      border: 1px solid var(--green);
      color: var(--green);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: transparent;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .hero-cta:hover {
      background: var(--green);
      color: var(--bg-primary);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
    }

    /* ── Skills / Orbit Section ───────────────────────────── */
    .orbit-container {
      position: relative;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 500px;
      height: 500px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .orbit-center {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%; left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 100px; height: 100px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border: 2px solid var(--green);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--green);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      z-index: 5;
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.2;
    }
    .orbit-ring {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%; left: 50%;
      border: 1px dashed var(--border-bright);
      border-radius: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    }
    .orbit-ring-1 { width: 240px; height: 240px; }
    .orbit-ring-2 { width: 370px; height: 370px; }
    .orbit-ring-3 { width: 490px; height: 490px; }
    .orbit-item {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%; left: 50%;
      width: 50px; height: 50px;
      margin: -25px 0 0 -25px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-bright);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--white);
      font-weight: 600;
      z-index: 10;
      transition: all 0.5s ease;
      cursor: default;
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.1;
      padding: 4px;
    }
    .orbit-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--green);
      color: var(--green);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      transform: scale(1.2);
      z-index: 20;
    }
    .orbit-item.ring-1 { animation: orbit1 12s linear infinite; }
    .orbit-item.ring-2 { animation: orbit2 20s linear infinite; }
    .orbit-item.ring-3 { animation: orbit3 30s linear infinite; }
    @keyframes orbit1 {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(120px) rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(120px) rotate(-360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes orbit2 {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(185px) rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(185px) rotate(-360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes orbit3 {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(245px) rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(245px) rotate(-360deg); }
    }
    .skills-list {
      margin-top: 2rem;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
      gap: 0.75rem;
    }
    .skill-bar-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.75rem;
      padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .skill-bar-label { color: var(--cyan); min-width: 80px; }
    .skill-bar-track {
      flex: 1;
      height: 4px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border-radius: 2px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .skill-bar-fill {
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), var(--cyan));
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: width 1.5s ease;
    }
    .skill-bar-pct { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.7rem; min-width: 30px; text-align: right; }

    /* ── Projects / Terminal Cards ────────────────────────── */
    .projects-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr));
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }
    .project-card {
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .project-card:hover {
      border-color: var(--green);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      transform: translateY(-4px);
    }
    .project-card-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .project-card-dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
    .project-card-dots span {
      width: 10px; height: 10px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .project-card-title {
      flex: 1;
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--gray);
    }
    .project-card-body { padding: 1.25rem; }
    .project-card-body .comment { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.8rem; }
    .project-card-body .code-block {
      margin: 0.75rem 0;
      padding: 1rem;
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
      overflow-x: auto;
    }
    .project-card-body .code-block .kw { color: var(--magenta); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .fn { color: var(--cyan); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .str { color: var(--orange); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .num { color: var(--yellow); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .cm { color: var(--gray-dim); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .op { color: var(--red); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .vr { color: var(--white); }
    .project-card-body .code-block .ty { color: var(--green); }
    .project-tags {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }
    .project-tag {
      padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      border-radius: 3px;
      border: 1px solid;
    }
    .project-tag.green { color: var(--green); border-color: var(--green-dark); }
    .project-tag.cyan { color: var(--cyan); border-color: rgba(0,212,255,0.2); }
    .project-tag.magenta { color: var(--magenta); border-color: rgba(255,121,198,0.2); }
    .project-tag.yellow { color: var(--yellow); border-color: rgba(241,250,140,0.2); }
    .project-links {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      display: flex;
      gap: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }

    /* ── Experience Timeline ──────────────────────────────── */
    .timeline {
      position: relative;
      padding-left: 2.5rem;
    }
    .timeline::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 10px;
      top: 0; bottom: 0;
      width: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--green), var(--cyan), var(--border));
    }
    .timeline-item {
      position: relative;
      margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
      padding: 1.5rem;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .timeline-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--cyan);
      box-shadow: var(--glow-cyan);
    }
    .timeline-item::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: -2.15rem;
      top: 1.75rem;
      width: 12px; height: 12px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green);
      border: 2px solid var(--bg-primary);
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,255,156,0.4);
    }
    .timeline-date {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--green);
      margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
    }
    .timeline-role {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--cyan);
    }
    .timeline-company {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    }
    .timeline-desc {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      line-height: 1.8;
    }
    .timeline-desc li {
      list-style: none;
      padding-left: 1.25rem;
      position: relative;
    }
    .timeline-desc li::before {
      content: '$';
      position: absolute;
      left: 0;
      color: var(--green);
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* ── GitHub Contribution Graph ─────────────────────────── */

      overflow-x: auto;
      padding: 1rem;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
    }

      gap: 0;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      padding-left: 36px;
    }
    .contrib-months span { min-width: 52px; }
    .contrib-grid {
      display: flex;
      gap: 3px;
    }
    .contrib-days-label {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 3px;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      color: var(--gray-dim);
      margin-right: 6px;
      padding-top: 0;
    }
    .contrib-days-label span {
      height: 11px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .contrib-columns {
      display: flex;
      gap: 3px;
    }
    .contrib-col {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 3px;
    }
    .contrib-cell {
      width: 11px; height: 11px;
      border-radius: 2px;
      background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    }
    .contrib-cell.l1 { background: #0e4429; }
    .contrib-cell.l2 { background: #006d32; }
    .contrib-cell.l3 { background: #26a641; }
    .contrib-cell.l4 { background: #39d353; }
    .contrib-legend {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      margin-top: 0.75rem;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: var(--gray);
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .contrib-legend .contrib-cell { width: 11px; height: 11px; }
    .contrib-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 2rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .contrib-stat-num { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .contrib-stat-label { color: var(--gray); }

    /* ── Blog / Code Snippets ──────────────────────────────── */
    .blog-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }
    .blog-card {
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .blog-card:hover {

      box-shadow: var(--glow-cyan);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }
    .blog-card-header {

    .blog-card-meta {

      color: var(--gray-dim);
    }

    /* ── Contact Terminal ──────────────────────────────────── */
    .contact-terminal {
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .contact-terminal .terminal-titlebar {

    .contact-body { padding: 2rem; }
    .contact-line {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .contact-prompt {
      color: var(--green);
      font-weight: 600;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .contact-input {
      flex: 1;
      min-width: 200px;
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
      color: var(--white);
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      transition: border-color var(--transition);
      outline: none;
    }
    .contact-input:focus { border-color: var(--green); }
    .contact-input::placeholder { color: var(--gray-dim); }
    .contact-textarea {
      resize: vertical;
      min-height: 100px;
    }
    .contact-submit {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.5rem;
      padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
      background: var(--green);
      color: var(--bg-primary);
      border: none;
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      font-family: var(--font-primary);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all var(--transition);
    }
    .contact-submit:hover {
      box-shadow: var(--glow-green);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }

    /* ── Footer ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
      padding: 3rem 0 2rem;
      border-top: 1px dashed var(--border);
      text-align: center;
    }
    .footer-ascii {
      color: var(--green-dim);
      font-size: 0.5rem;
      line-height: 1.15;
      white-space: pre;
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
      opacity: 0.5;
    }
    .footer-links {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 2rem;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
    }
    .footer-copy {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--gray-dim);
    }
    .footer-copy .heart { color: var(--red); }

    /* ── Responsive ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .nav-terminal { padding: 0 1rem; gap: 0.25rem; }
      .nav-cmd { padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
      .nav-cmd::before { content: ''; }
      .terminal-body { padding: 1.25rem; }
      .hero-ascii { display: none; }
      .orbit-container { height: 380px; }
      .orbit-ring-1 { width: 180px; height: 180px; }
      .orbit-ring-2 { width: 280px; height: 280px; }
      .orbit-ring-3 { width: 370px; height: 370px; }
      @keyframes orbit1 {
        from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(90px) rotate(0deg); }
        to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(90px) rotate(-360deg); }
      }
      @keyframes orbit2 {
        from { transform: rotate(0deg) translateX(140px) rotate(0deg); }
        to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(140px) rotate(-360deg); }
      }
      @keyframes orbit3 {

        to   { transform: rotate(360deg) translateX(185px) rotate(-360deg); }
      }
      .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .blog-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .skills-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .contrib-stats { flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .orbit-container { height: 320px; max-width: 320px; }
      .orbit-ring-3 { display: none; }
      .orbit-item.ring-3 { display: none; }
    }

    /* ── Scroll Reveal ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(30px);
      transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
    }
    .reveal.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
  </style>

  <script>
    /* ── Matrix Rain ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initMatrixRain() {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('matrix-canvas');
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      let w, h, columns, drops;
      const chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}|;:,./<>?~`';
      const fontSize = 14;

      function resize() {
        w = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
        h = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
        columns = Math.floor(w / fontSize);
        drops = Array(columns).fill(1);
      }
      resize();
      window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

      function draw() {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 14, 20, 0.05)';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff9c';
        ctx.font = fontSize + 'px monospace';
        for (let i = 0; i < drops.length; i++) {
          const char = chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
          ctx.fillText(char, i * fontSize, drops[i] * fontSize);
          if (drops[i] * fontSize > h && Math.random() > 0.975) {
            drops[i] = 0;
          }
          drops[i]++;
        }
      }
      setInterval(draw, 50);
    })();

    /* ── Typewriter Effect ───────────────────────────────── */
    (function initTypewriter() {
      const el = document.getElementById('typewriter');
      const phrases = [
        'Full-Stack Developer',
        'Open Source Contributor',
        'Systems Architect',
        'DevOps Engineer',
        'Rust Enthusiast',
        'Coffee → Code Converter'
      ];
      let phraseIdx = 0, charIdx = 0, deleting = false, pause = 0;

      function type() {
        const current = phrases[phraseIdx];
        if (pause > 0) { pause--; requestAnimationFrame(type); return; }

        if (!deleting) {
          el.textContent = current.substring(0, charIdx + 1);
          charIdx++;
          if (charIdx === current.length) { deleting = true; pause = 60; }
        } else {
          el.textContent = current.substring(0, charIdx - 1);
          charIdx--;
          if (charIdx === 0) { deleting = false; phraseIdx = (phraseIdx + 1) % phrases.length; pause = 15; }
        }
        setTimeout(() => requestAnimationFrame(type), deleting ? 35 : 70);
      }
      type();
    })();

    /* ── GitHub Contribution Graph ────────────────────────── */
    (function initContribGraph() {
      const container = document.getElementById('contrib-graph');
      const months = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];
      const days = ['','Mon','','Wed','','Fri',''];
      const weeks = 52;
      const levels = ['','l1','l2','l3','l4'];

      // Month labels
      const monthsDiv = document.createElement('div');
      monthsDiv.className = 'contrib-months';
      for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
        const s = document.createElement('span');
        s.textContent = months[i];
        monthsDiv.appendChild(s);
      }
      container.appendChild(monthsDiv);

      const gridWrap = document.createElement('div');
      gridWrap.style.display = 'flex';

      // Day labels
      const daysDiv = document.createElement('div');
      daysDiv.className = 'contrib-days-label';
      days.forEach(d => {
        const s = document.createElement('span');
        s.textContent = d;
        daysDiv.appendChild(s);
      });
      gridWrap.appendChild(daysDiv);

      // Columns (weeks)
      const colsDiv = document.createElement('div');
      colsDiv.className = 'contrib-columns';
      let totalContribs = 0;
      for (let w = 0; w < weeks; w++) {
        const col = document.createElement('div');
        col.className = 'contrib-col';
        for (let d = 0; d < 7; d++) {
          const cell = document.createElement('div');
          cell.className = 'contrib-cell';
          const r = Math.random();
          if (r > 0.35) {
            let lvl;
            if (r > 0.92) lvl = 4;
            else if (r > 0.82) lvl = 3;
            else if (r > 0.6) lvl = 2;
            else lvl = 1;
            cell.classList.add(levels[lvl]);
            totalContribs += lvl;
          }
          col.appendChild(cell);
        }
        colsDiv.appendChild(col);
      }
      gridWrap.appendChild(colsDiv);
      container.appendChild(gridWrap);

      // Legend
      const legend = document.createElement('div');
      legend.className = 'contrib-legend';
      legend.innerHTML = 'Less ';
      levels.forEach(l => {
        const c = document.createElement('div');
        c.className = 'contrib-cell ' + l;
        legend.appendChild(c);
      });
      legend.innerHTML += ' More';
      container.appendChild(legend);

      // Stats
      const stats = document.createElement('div');
      stats.className = 'contrib-stats';
      stats.innerHTML = `
        <div><span class="contrib-stat-num">${totalContribs}</span> <span class="contrib-stat-label">contributions in the last year</span></div>
        <div><span class="contrib-stat-num">${Math.floor(totalContribs / 7)}</span> <span class="contrib-stat-label">avg per day</span></div>
        <div><span class="contrib-stat-num">${Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 15}</span> <span class="contrib-stat-label">day streak</span></div>
      `;
      container.appendChild(stats);
    })();

    /* ── Scroll Reveal ────────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initScrollReveal() {
      const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
      const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            entry.target.classList.add('visible');
          }
        });
      }, { threshold: 0.1 });
      reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
    })();

    /* ── Nav Active State ─────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initNavActive() {
      const sections = document.querySelectorAll('section[id]');
      const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-cmd');
      const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            navLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
            const link = document.querySelector(`.nav-cmd[href="#${entry.target.id}"]`);
            if (link) link.classList.add('active');
          }
        });
      }, { threshold: 0.3 });
      sections.forEach(s => observer.observe(s));
    })();

    /* ── Contact Form ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    (function initContact() {
      const btn = document.getElementById('contact-submit');
      const form = document.getElementById('contact-form');
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const name = document.getElementById('c-name').value.trim();
        const email = document.getElementById('c-email').value.trim();
        const msg = document.getElementById('c-msg').value.trim();
        if (!name || !email || !msg) {
          btn.textContent = '> error: fill all fields';
          btn.style.background = 'var(--red)';
          setTimeout(() => {
            btn.textContent = '> send_message';
            btn.style.background = '';
          }, 2000);
          return;
        }
        btn.textContent = '> sending...';
        btn.disabled = true;
        setTimeout(() => {
          btn.textContent = '> message_sent ✓';
          btn.style.background = 'var(--cyan)';
          setTimeout(() => {
            btn.textContent = '> send_message';
            btn.style.background = '';
            btn.disabled = false;
            form.reset();
          }, 2500);
        }, 1500);
      });
    })();

    /* ── Smooth scroll for nav ────────────────────────────── */
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-cmd').forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const target = document.querySelector(link.getAttribute('href'));
        if (target) {
          target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
        }
      });
    });
  </script>
